guide.heading: User Guide for Find Your Alleys
guide.intro: This website helps festival visitors find booths easily. Booth owners post information and sample images, while visitors can search, filter, and bookmark their favorite booths.
guide.forSellers: Post sample images, booth info, fandoms, merch types, preorders, deals… so visitors can find you easily.
guide.forBuyers: Search by booth name, fandom, or merch type. Bookmark favorite booths to revisit later.
guide.ocCardsGuide: Post your OC cards to trade at festivals. Send trade requests, accept/decline, and view your trade list.
guide.featuredGuide: Each booth can pick one standout product to show on the "Featured" page.
guide.promoGuide: Attach a short deal badge displayed on the card, along with a detailed description.
guide.postStep2: Fill in info: title, festival, description, artist, sample images, fandom tags, merch types…
guide.postStep3: If you have preorders, select Yes and paste the link.
guide.titleGuideIntro: When posting a sample, you'll fill in two separate fields: Booth Code and Title (booth name).
guide.titleBoothCodeDesc: Enter your booth code from the festival's floor map. Each festival will have its own booth code field.
guide.titleBoothNameDesc: Enter your booth name. You no longer need to include the booth code here.
guide.titleAvoidHint1: Leaving booth code empty - your booth won't appear on the floor map
guide.titleAvoidHint2: Using generic titles like "my booth" — hard to find
guide.titleSeparateHint: You don't need to include the booth code in the title anymore since the system has separate fields for them.
guide.editDeleteIntro: Go to your <bold>Profile</bold> page, under 'Posted samples'. If you're the booth owner, you'll see 2 icons at the top-right corner of your booth card:
guide.editIconDesc: ✏️ Pencil icon: click to go to the edit page.
guide.deleteIconDesc: 🗑️ Trash icon: click to delete the booth (with confirmation).
guide.editDeleteWarning: ⚠️ These icons only appear when you're signed in with the account that posted the booth.
guide.postOcStep2: Fill in OC owner name, OC image, OC name, festival, contact info, identification…
guide.sendTradeStep1: Find the OC card you want to trade → click "Send trade request".
guide.sendTradeStep2: Select your card to trade, fill in contact method and message.
guide.sendTradeStep3: The OC owner will receive a notification and can accept/decline.
guide.editOcStep1: Click on your OC card → click the pencil icon to edit, or the delete button 🗑️ to delete.
guide.editOcStep2: In the edit page, you can change images, name, description, availability…
guide.searchBarDesc: Type booth name, location, artist, fandom… to find quickly.
guide.fandomFilterDesc: Select one or more fandoms to filter.
guide.bookmarkStep1: Click Save on a booth card to bookmark, Remove to unbookmark.
guide.bookmarkStep2: View all bookmarked booths at Profile → Saved booths.
guide.bookmarkStep3: Export bookmark list as a file to bring to the festival.
guide.profileIntro: The Profile page shows all your activity on the website:
guide.profilePostedDesc: List of booths you've posted. You can edit/delete your booths from here.
guide.profileOcDesc: Your OC cards, editable/deletable from here.
guide.profileExportDesc: Export your bookmark and trade lists as files.
guide.artistsNav: From the home page → choose a festival → click the "Artists" button.
guide.artistsDesc1: View all artists with booths at the festival, sorted by name.
guide.artistsDesc2: Click an artist's name to see all their samples.
guide.artistsDesc3: Useful if you want to find booths of a favorite artist.
guide.imageMultiple: Each booth can post multiple images - each image has its own fandom & merch type tags.
guide.imageSize: Images should be ≤ 3MB for successful upload.
guide.imageZoom: Click on an image in the detail page to zoom in, drag to view details.
guide.imageFeatured: Featured merch: Pick your one best product - it will appear on the "Featured" page.
guide.mapNav: From the home page → choose a festival → click the "Map" button.
guide.mapDesc1: The Map page shows booth positions on an interactive floor plan.
guide.mapDesc2: Click a booth on the map to see quick info, click again to go to the detail page.
guide.mapDesc3: You can zoom and drag the map (mouse or touch). Zoom in to see booth names.
guide.mapDesc4: Stamp Rally mode: switch to the Stamp Rally tab to see participating booths highlighted with colors.
guide.statsNav: From the home page → choose a festival → click the "Stats" button.
guide.statsDesc1: The Stats page aggregates data from all booths in the festival.
guide.statsDesc2: View charts of popular fandoms, merch types, and top artists.
guide.statsDesc3: See rare fandoms and merch - expandable to show more.
guide.statsDesc4: Quick summary: total booths, preorder booths, deal booths, booths per day.
guide.tagsNav: From the home page → choose a festival → click the "Tags" button.
guide.tagsDesc1: Each booth can have custom tags (e.g. character names, pairings, themes…).
guide.tagsDesc2: The Tags page lists all tags in the festival. Click a tag to see related booths.
guide.tagsDesc3: Popular tags also appear on the Stats page.
guide.faq1q: I can't find the edit/delete icons?
guide.faq1a: Edit/delete icons only appear on the Profile page, under 'Posted samples'. Make sure you're signed in with the same account used to post.
guide.faq2a: Check the image size (≤ 3MB). If it's too large, reduce the size before uploading.
guide.faq3q: Booth in 2 festivals, how to enter booth codes?
guide.faq3a: Each festival has its own booth code field. Just fill in the booth code for each festival separately.
guide.faq4q: Sent a trade request but no response?
guide.faq4a: The OC owner will receive a notification. Please be patient, or contact them directly if you provided contact info in your trade request.
guide.tagGuideIntro: To help others find your booth easily, please follow these tagging guidelines:
guide.tagFandomRule1: Use the official series/franchise name (e.g. "Jujutsu Kaisen", not "JJK").
guide.tagFandomRule2: Do not put character names or ships in fandom. E.g. "Erwin Smith" or "Eruri" are not fandoms.
guide.tagFandomRule3: Character names, pairings, and ships should go in "Extra tags".
guide.tagItemRule1: Enter the product type (e.g. "Standee", "Keychain", "Print"). Don't put fandom names here.
guide.tagExtraRule1: Use for character names, pairings/ships, themes, or any keyword that helps buyers find you.
guide.tagApprovalRule1: New tags won't appear in the homepage filters immediately. An admin will review and approve them soon.
guide.tagApprovalRule2: You can still select unapproved tags when posting your booth, but they won't show in filters until approved.

donate.title: Support the project
donate.intro: FindYourAlley is developed and maintained completely for free. If you find the website useful, you can buy me a coffee to help keep the server running and develop new features!
donate.thanks: Thank you so much! Every contribution motivates me to keep improving the website.

catManage.name: Name
catManage.confirmDelete: Delete tag "{name}"? It will be removed from all booths.
catManage.confirmMerge: Merge "{source}" into "{target}"? All booths using this tag will switch to the target.
